final:
// // This module performs bitwise NOT operations instead of arithmetic or logical operations.
module ALU_64bit (  
    input [63:0] A,  
    input [63:0] B,  
    input [2:0] control,  
    output reg [63:0] result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (control)  
            3'b000: result = A + B;       // Addition  
            3'b001: result = A - B;       // Subtraction  
            3'b010: result = A & B;       // Bitwise AND  
            3'b011: result = A | B;       // Bitwise OR  
            3'b100: result = A ^ B;       // Bitwise XOR  
            default: result = 64'b0;      // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module performs bitwise NOT operations instead of arithmetic or logical operations.
